events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Aura Kai notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
